subcodes.first_line: O Bahram! Bahram is a star that illumineth both East and West, and a light-beam that [illumineth] the darkened world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بهرام بهرام اختریست که خاور و باختر را روشن نماید و پرتویست که جهان تاریک
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @naming of children; of individuals, @call to action, @praise and encouragement
